title: Bollywood - For Your Entertainment [Collab]
description:
Watch in HD for an eyegasm ;)
The first big collab I hosted! :D I am so excited for you all to see this! This was supposed to be uploaded two months ago but there were complications with Catherine's (xxBollywoodLuverxx) parts,she is in the hospital right now and we all hope she gets better soon. :(

I wanted to host a "sexy" collab with all the young actors and actresses of Bollywood for the longest time and this is the outcome! :D Here is everyone's parts in order:
1) 3bit89 - Ranbir Kapoor
http://youtube.com/3bit89
2) AnushkaPartner (fill in for Catherine) - Katrina Kaif
http://youtube.com/AnushkaPartner
3) Me - Ranveer Singh
4 + 5) Paheli1989 - Ali Zafar & Sonam Kapoor
http://youtube.com/Paheli1989
6) Me - Deepika Padukone
7) TheMeliCrazyy - Priyanka Chopra
http://youtube.com/TheMeliCrazyy
8) AnushkaPartner - Shahid Kapoor
9) HigherW0rld - Amrita Rao
http://youtube.com/HigherW0rld
10) 3bit89 - Anushka Sharma
11) TheMeliCrazyy - Imran Khan
12) HigherW0rld - Ranbir Kapoor

Thank you for those who participated,you all did an amazing job! :D I really hope I can host more of these collab. Hope everyone who watches enjoys! Make sure to leave a comment!

Song: Adam Lambert - For Your Entertainment (+Pitch)
Coloring made by Paheli1989,3bit89 & me :)
Oh by the way it is my birthday tomorrow! :D YAY.
